heading: “Bank” defined
label: 2214a “Bank” defined
text: In this part, the term “bank” includes each association operating under subchapter II.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 4.28A of title IV of , which provided for chartering of Farm Credit System Capital Corporation by Farm Credit Administration and revoked charter of Farm Credit System Capital Corporation which had been issued under part D of this subchapter, was classified to , prior to repeal by , , .Pub.
